prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年西北工业大学在北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约5860名→5408名→6045名→3267名→2767名。2024年起因选科要求调整为"物理+化学必选"，位次大 幅前移约2778名；2025年继续前移至2767名，近两年累计前移约3278名，反映出选科门槛提高后竞争格局显著优化；该校在北京市招生计划2021–2023年均为35 人，2024年增至37人，2025年骤降至27人；2026年进一步缩至19人，较2025年减少约29.6%，缩招幅度显著，将加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北工业大学为985工程、 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第25→2022年第24→2023年第25→2024年第23→2025年第21→2026年第23，稳居全国前25名，属于顶尖工科院校；2024年声誉评价偏负面（遭受境外网络攻击）；2026年声誉评价偏负面（学生被地方黑恶势力殴打，校方被指偏袒不作为）；抖音热度排名第74、评价"一般"，主要传播内容为 余承东演讲及大国重器相关正面形象，整体舆情偏中性略负面；第五轮学科评估中航空宇航科学与技术A+、材料科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A+、机械工程 A、信息与通信工程A-、控制科学与工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共7个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信 、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业在2026年均为"高热推荐"状态，与西北工业大学优势专业方向一致，提升报考吸引力；北京市2026年高考考生总数约84900人，较2025年65434人 增加约29.7%，竞争压力显著加大；西北工业大学位于陕西西安，属异地办学；2025年在京招生27人，2026年缩至19人， 招生规模较小，地域偏好对北京考生报考决策影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2767名、2026年招生计划大幅缩招29.6%、北京市考生 总数增加约29.7%加剧竞争、声誉偏负面略有降温、以及优势学科与热门工科专业高度匹配等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2275名基础上小幅修正至约2325名，区间1976–2674 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 航空航天类（陈士橹飞天班）
- 航空航天类（智慧三航拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 航空航天类（航天）
- 航空航天类（航空）
- 计算机类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 物理学类（空天应用物理拔尖班）
- 软件工程（2024年招生，2026年未列出）
- 自动化类（2024年招生）
- 材料类（2024年招生）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1976–2674名内，建议以二档航空航天类和计算机类为主攻方向，一档拔尖班可冲刺，三档物理学类等作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（1976名以内）可重点冲 击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Northwestern Polytechnical University in Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 5860 → 5408 → 6045 → 3267 → 2767. Starting in 2024, due to the adjustment of subject requirements to "Physics + Chemistry mandatory," the ranking moved significantly forward by about 2778 places; in 2025, it continued to move forward to 2767, with a cumulative forward shift of about 3278 places over the past two years, reflecting a significant optimization of the competitive landscape after raising the subject selection threshold. The university's enrollment plan in Beijing was 35 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 37 in 2024, and sharply dropped to 27 in 2025; in 2026, it further shrank to 19 students, a decrease of about 29.6% compared to 2025, a significant reduction that will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwestern Polytechnical University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 25th in 2021 → 24th in 2022 → 25th in 2023 → 23rd in 2024 → 21st in 2025 → 23rd in 2026, consistently in the top 25 nationally, belonging to top-tier engineering institutions; in 2024, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (suffered from overseas cyber attacks); in 2026, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (students were beaten by local criminal forces, and the university was accused of bias and inaction); Douyin popularity ranking 74th, with an evaluation of "average," mainly spreading positive images related to Yu Chengdong's speeches and major national equipment, overall public opinion is neutral to slightly negative; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Aerospace Science and Technology A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, a total of 7 disciplines at A- or above, with outstanding engineering strength, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all in a "highly popular recommendation" state in 2026, consistent with Northwestern Polytechnical University's advantageous majors, enhancing the attractiveness of applications; the total number of Beijing college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is about 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, significantly increasing competitive pressure; Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, which is an out-of-town institution; in 2025, it enrolled 27 students in Beijing, and in 2026, it shrank to 19 students, with a small enrollment scale, and regional preferences have limited impact on Beijing candidates' application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2767, the significant 29.6% reduction in enrollment plan for 2026, the approximately 29.7% increase in the total number of Beijing candidates intensifying competition, the slightly negative reputation causing some cooling, and the high match between advantageous disciplines and popular engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be slightly adjusted from 2275 to about 2325, with a range of 1976–2674.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Aerospace Engineering (Chen Shiliu Feitian Class)
- Aerospace Engineering (Smart Three Aerospace Top Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Aerospace Engineering (Space)
- Aerospace Engineering (Aviation)
- Computer Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Physics (Aerospace Applied Physics Top Talent Class)
- Software Engineering (enrolled in 2024, not listed in 2026)
- Automation (enrolled in 2024)
- Materials Science (enrolled in 2024).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1976–2674, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Aerospace Engineering and Computer Science as main targets, Tier 1 top talent classes can be attempted as reaches, and Tier 3 Physics, etc., as safeties. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1976), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
